prompt: Minimalist kintsugi egg avatar. Simple white/cream egg shape. Two small flat black dot eyes — calm, knowing, not cute. Tiny subtle smile — a gentle curve suggesting quiet confidence. Sparse asymmetrical gold kintsugi cracks on one side only — elegant, understated (the scars whisper, they don't shout). Very small simple black bow tie at the bottom. Warm soft peach/tan gradient background. Flat modern illustration style, clean lines. No eyebrows. Zen aesthetic. Someone who has been through fire and is quietly okay with that. Profile avatar.
